files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index ae81daf..8e2e80c 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -117,2 +117,9 @@ Day 112 / Week 16 observations:
 - Open issue volume rose to 770. S2 issue age is still below half a day on average, but support-related social posts about critical bugs/radio silence resurfaced.
 - Week 16 adjustment: keep ads/prices/dev/capacity stable while tier-2 R&D runs, increase S2/S1 support coverage, and post a concrete critical-bug status-update commitment.
+
+Day 119 / Week 17 observations:
+- Cash rose to $478k. Weekly subscription payments were $466k against about $240k in operating costs, so the business is strongly cash-positive again.
+- S2 content remains the engine: 1,509 paid content subscribers from 4,317 leads, led by 867 C users and 522 B users.
+- Usage peaked at 1.79M/day, still under tier-3 capacity but close enough that tier-4 planning should start if growth continues.
+- Support sentiment improved after the SLA post, but new social posts still mention critical-bug radio silence and support handoffs. S2 issue age is acceptable, but open issue count is near 1,000.
+- Week 17 adjustment: hold acquisition/pricing/capacity steady, increase support spend again, and post about accuracy/evaluation work while tier-2 R&D is in progress.
